_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: The three identified factors ('Functioning', 'Symptoms', and 'Emotions') explained 76.4% of the total variance...The Kaiser–Meyer–Olkin test verified the sampling adequacy for the analysis, with a KMO of 0.89
details: Factor analysis confirmed three-domain structure explaining 76.4% of total variance with adequate sampling (KMO=0.89)
